customers_say: Customers find the smart door lock to be of professional quality and appreciate its efficient installation process. The lock works reliably and comes with a host of features and options, with one customer noting its multiple control methods. They find it easy to use and consider it good value for money, while also praising its stylish appearance and good service from Lavna Locks.

reviews.author: Astute Software
reviews.title: A good product
reviews.body: Seems good, sometimes it doesn't accept the finger prints but maximum times it works fine apart from this require a feature where i can see someone standing on the door. But currently its not available untill he press the bell of the lock

reviews.author: Somkar Singh
reviews.title: Customer service is not up to the mark
reviews.body: It is a great product but, cost is too high . Customer support is also not upto the mark.

reviews.author: Amit Savaliya
reviews.title: Value for Money
reviews.body: Value for Money, good quality and service. Also face recognition, alarm and capturing logs on every unlock is something not found in this price. For battery life and durability can't comment right now but overall a good product till now.

reviews.author: Syam
reviews.title: Good product and great value for money
reviews.body: Product is good need to learn so many basics which will be little strange to get familiar during installation
